title: One missing from the hundred sheep
firstLine: One missing from the hundred sheep;
publicDomainBasis: Elizabeth Cecelia Douglas Clephane (1830–1869), Ira David Sankey (1840–1908). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
One missing from the hundred sheep;
Good Shepherd Jesus grieved;
Though path was rugged, rough, and steep,
He sought to save that sheep.
Lost sheep, turn back! Turn back, lost sheep!
Ahead are traps and fearsome beasts!
Oh, hurry back, immediately!
